pipeline.name: Business Development
pipeline.description: Fund distribution pipeline tracking investor contacts from first touch through commitment or decline.

stages.name: Follow Up #1
stages.description: First automated follow-up, 30 days after James's manual initial outreach.

follow_up.notes: Single follow-up with a data hook. If no reply, auto-advance to Follow Up #2.

stages.name: Follow Up #2
stages.description: Second automated follow-up, 30 days after Follow Up #1. Last attempt before breakup.

follow_up.notes: Different hook than Follow Up #1. After no reply, auto-advance to Breakup.

stages.name: Breakup
stages.description: Permission-to-close email. Final direct outreach before marking inactive.

follow_up.notes: Tone: respectful close. These often get the fastest responses.

stages.name: Engaged
stages.description: Contact has responded, had a call, or requested materials. Goal: schedule a call with Paul.

follow_up.notes: Responsive contacts get more patience. Nudge toward scheduling a Paul call. If they go silent for 3+ weeks, consider re-engagement via introducer.

stages.name: Post-Meeting
stages.description: Contact has spoken with Paul. Follow-up focuses on candid feedback and addressing concerns.

follow_up.notes: First follow-up within 48 hours of meeting. Ask for candid feedback and proactively address likely concerns.

stages.name: Due Diligence
stages.description: Contact has requested data room access or is actively reviewing materials. Real momentum.

follow_up.notes: Tighter cadence — these have real momentum. Proactively offer to clarify anything in the data room. Weekly check-in minimum.
No automated follow-up. Relationship management handled outside pipeline.

stages.name: On Hold
stages.description: Passed but left the door open. Stay on distribution list, re-engage quarterly.

follow_up.notes: Touch base quarterly with something substantive — new performance data, milestone, or market-relevant update. Never a naked check-in.

stages.name: Declined (Cold)
stages.description: No response after breakup email, or clear 'not interested.' Remove from active pipeline.

follow_up.notes: Annual check-in at most. Only re-engage with a compelling reason.
